name: MiniNt Registry Key Creation/Modification Detected (Event Log Evasion)
description: Critical defense evasion detected: Creation or modification of the 'HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\MiniNt' registry key, which can disable Windows Event Logging after reboot.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the registry event.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the registry modification occurred.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process made the registry change.

parameters.name: ProcessName
parameters.description: The name of the process that modified the registry.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the process image that modified the registry.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line of the process that modified the registry.

parameters.name: TargetObject
parameters.description: The full registry key/value path that was modified or created.

parameters.name: Details
parameters.description: The new value written to the registry key, if Event ID 13.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
